content_body: Family gatherings are very special to us since we are only able to do it twice a year. From Alabama, South Georgia and even all the way from Oregon, so this week in the mountains was very special. We have decided against the beach from now on - it's mountains, blue skies and water! Monday was the perfect lazy, rainy day. Tuesday was a day of fishing and exploring - the gazebo alone has inspired a backyard getaway reminder. Wednesday, the 4th, was a great day of BBQ, laughter and good food. Thursday was "venture day" from precious boutiques downtown, a record breaking round of golf at butternut creek - nice course in Blairsville, a three-year old's first catch with Daddy, and Baby's first wave - it was a blessed day. On Friday we put the "ad" in Adventure when seven of us went whitewater rafting and only three stayed in the boat for the entire trip!!  Scars are tattoos with better stories! That night we REALLY appreciated the hot tub. All in all the week was FULL of Great food, memorable moments and family togetherness. Thanks!
title: Week of Family Fun in Blue Ridge, GA
